name: Employer said no lawyer needed for my work ladder injury, true?

mainEntity.name: Employer said no lawyer needed for my work ladder injury, true?

acceptedAnswer.description:
No, insurers lowball without representation; lawyers secure 2-3x more on average.[2][3]

Handle complexities like denials or third-parties.[1]

- Free consult, contingency pay.
- Spot extra claims.
- Negotiate better.

Insist on independent advice; protect your future.
